_comment: Bootstrap model overrides — burns Qwen's 1M-token free grant for initial bulk data seeding. Switch back to agent-models.json for continuous/production use. Usage: seed-agents.py --mode bootstrap OR --models-file agent-models-bootstrap.json
_strategy: Qwen for L1 data agents (heaviest token consumers) and cron-planner (orchestrator). L2 analysts and L3 synthesizer stay on production providers — they run after bootstrap, not during. GitHub Models used for low-volume L2 where Qwen budget should be preserved.

_token_budget.qwen3-max: 1M tokens (90-day grant) — best quality, use for complex profiles (countries, companies)
_token_budget.qwen-plus: 1M tokens (90-day grant) — good quality, use for structured data (stocks, ETFs, commodities)
_token_budget.qwen-flash: 1M tokens (90-day grant) — fastest, use for simple lookups (sources, indices)

agents._design: Bootstrap mode: Qwen for data-heavy agents to burn the free 1M-token grant per model variant. Each Qwen model variant (qwen3-max, qwen-plus, qwen-flash) gets its own 1M pool, so spread across variants. After bootstrap, run: seed-agents.py --mode continuous to switch to production providers.

osint-data._load: BOOTSTRAP: ~165 country + 48 region profiles, needs best reasoning
